32296.title: Bad Move
32296.description: When Nicky and Steve discover their kitchen has flooded, Steve thinks the source of the flooding is a natural spring and hopes it will be the answer to all their problems.

32297.title: Unforgotten
32297.description: Enquiries into David Walker's past suggest that he was a troubled man with a number of issues. Marion has a prickly chat with Cassie about her past.

32298.title: Call the Midwife
32298.description: The team tries to unite an estranged mother and daughter who are both pregnant. Also, Trixie's friend is devastated to discover she is pregnant.

32299.title: The Kettering Incident
32299.description: Anna wakes in the asylum with Dr McKenzie waiting for her, but she stealthily escapes while McKenzie is out of the room. Meanwhile, Dane finally hears Eliza calling from under the dam.

32300.title: Unforgotten
32300.description: Enquiries into David Walker's past suggest that he was a troubled man with a number of issues. Marion has a prickly chat with Cassie about her past.

32301.title: Keeping Up Appearances
32301.description: With Hyacinth so excited about attending a country house sale, Richard is worried that she'll spend too much.

32302.title: Bargain Hunt
32302.description: Anita Manning hosts from Epsom Racecourse in Surrey with experts Danny Sebastian and David Harper. The blues are after golden gavels while the reds are spending big. Meanwhile, Anita finds out about the fascinating history of Epsom racecourse.

32303.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators
32303.description: A workplace compensation claim is not as straightforward as it first seems. Frank is sceptical when a long-lost relative tracks him down.

32304.title: Impossible
32304.description: Thirty players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

32305.title: Bargain Hunt
32305.description: The location is in the grounds of Kedleston Hall in Derbyshire. Presenter Eric Knowles leads the fray and the experts are Danny Sebastian and Jonathan Pratt. Two teams of married couples take on each other to buy three items that will hopefully make a profit at auction. One team can't get away from ceramics and the other find an unusual American clock.

32306.title: Keeping Up Appearances
32306.description: With Hyacinth so excited about attending a country house sale, Richard is worried that she'll spend too much.

32307.title: Doctors
32307.description: Workplace crushes hot up for Daniel and Bear, but only Daniel is enjoying the attention. Karen intervenes when a bitterly divorced couple arrive for appointments at the same time.

32308.title: EastEnders
32308.description: Mick's misfortune leaves Linda feeling abandoned. Ruby and Lily make a breakthrough, Bernie is left disappointed, and Rocky vows to help Sonia.

32312.title: George Clarke's Old House New Home
32312.description: George helps more homeowners make their period homes fit for modern life, taking on an outmoded 1930s semi in Liverpool for teachers Simon and Sofie and a stunning medieval farmhouse in Kent that is like a perfectly preserved time capsule.

32315.title: Bargain Hunt
32315.description: Charlie Ross steers the show, which comes from the British Motor Museum in Warwickshire. Experts Richard Madley and Thomas Plant help the blue and red teams navigate the antique and collectors' fair, before they head off to the auction in Lichfield.

32319.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators
32319.description: Frank and Lu struggle to protect a troubled teen who suffers from nightmarish premonitions of murder.

32320.title: George Clarke's Old House New Home
32320.description: George helps more homeowners make their period homes fit for modern life, taking on an outmoded 1930s semi in Liverpool for teachers Simon and Sofie and a stunning medieval farmhouse in Kent that is like a perfectly preserved time capsule.

32321.title: Bad Move
32321.description: Nicky and Steve's dreams of peaceful country nights are shattered by Grizzo and his band rehearsing his latest album outdoors.

32322.title: Keeping Up Appearances
32322.description: Hyacinth gets excited when she learns that her next-door neighbour Emmet is rehearsing an amateur production of the musical `The Boyfriend'.

32323.title: Doctors
32323.description: Workplace crushes hot up for Daniel and Bear, but only Daniel is enjoying the attention. Karen intervenes when a bitterly divorced couple arrive for appointments at the same time.

32324.description: Mick's misfortune leaves Linda feeling abandoned. Ruby and Lily make a breakthrough, Bernie is left disappointed, and Rocky vows to help Sonia.

32325.description: Thirty players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

32326.title: Bargain Hunt
32326.description: Anita Manning hosts from Epsom Racecourse in Surrey with experts Danny Sebastian and David Harper. The blues are after golden gavels while the reds are spending big. Meanwhile, Anita finds out about the fascinating history of Epsom racecourse.

32327.title: Doctors
32327.description: It's a big day for Valerie, but Karen has forgotten something important. When a documentary film-maker visits the prison, Daniel helps a young inmate who is struggling to find his way out of the system.

32328.title: EastEnders
32328.description: Ruby tells Martin she has made her mind up, Mick and Linda have a choice to make, and Keegan's good news leaves Tiffany feeling disheartened.

32329.title: Antiques Roadshow
32329.description: The team is at Buckfast Abbey, a Benedictine monastery on the edge of Dartmoor in Devon. Finds include a glorious tiara, a teddy bear with an intriguing secret, and a silver platter that is not all that it seems.

32330.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators
32330.description: Frank and Lu investigate a death threat at Runningbrook, an exclusive tennis club which hides a toxic threat.

32331.title: The Split
32331.description: Leading divorce lawyer, Hannah Stern, finds business is personal when she leaves the family firm for rivals Noble and Hale, and finally faces her father who walked out 30 years ago.

32332.title: Ordinary Lies
32332.description: On the surface Joe seems to have the perfect family life. But when a sneaking suspicion turns into him installing CCTV in his home, he finds that the truth is a bitter pill to swallow.
